summary: Completed backend testing for Stylist Power-Up (Phase R) compose-outfit endpoint. Main functionality working correctly with 8/9 tests passing.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Single-image stylist endpoint returning 500 error due to Gemini image processing failure
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: GeminiException BadRequestError - Unable to process input image
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use compose-outfit endpoint for single images instead

passed_tests: Auth Token Acquisition - dev-bypass working correctly
Compose Outfit Text Only - returns proper canvas structure with gaps and marketplace suggestions
Compose Outfit Empty Body - correctly returns 400 error with expected message
Compose Outfit Single Image - processes single image and returns candidates
Compose Outfit Multiple Images - dedup logic working, rejected duplicates with proper structure
Hebrew Brief Support - Hebrew text processed without crashes, triggers professional suggestions
Professional Matcher - wedding/tailor keywords trigger professional suggestions correctly
Persistence and History - compose-outfit results properly stored in stylist session history
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the single-image stylist endpoint (/api/v1/stylist) - Gemini image processing is failing with 'Unable to process input image' error. The compose-outfit endpoint works fine, so this appears to be a regression in the original stylist endpoint.
